visual_identity: frozen from selected 3D calico cat; no redesign

optical_flow.reason: previous optical-flow master produced morphing and soft legs; this version uses key poses and 2.5D rig for running rows

idle.pipeline: clean key poses -> hold/ease master -> codex sampling

running-right.pipeline: clean key poses -> 2.5D body/leg/tail rig -> 32-frame master -> codex sampling
failures_before_repair: source running row judged morph-like; switched to 2.5D puppet/rig
source running-left regenerated from repaired running-right rig for consistency

waving.pipeline: clean key poses -> hold/ease master -> codex sampling

jumping.pipeline: clean proportional jump key poses -> 24-frame master -> 5-frame Codex row
failures_before_repair: jumping rebuilt as proportional crouch -> takeoff -> peak -> fall -> land

failed.pipeline: full-body sad sit -> sink -> readable side-roll key poses -> 24-frame master -> 8-frame Codex row
failures_before_repair: failed rebuilt to remove flat half-body side strips

waiting.pipeline: clean stretch key poses -> 24-frame master -> 6-frame Codex sampling
failures_before_repair: waiting previously mixed stretch and yawn in 6 frames; simplified to one stretch loop

running.pipeline: clean key poses -> hold/ease master -> codex sampling

review.pipeline: clean seated observation key poses -> 16-frame master -> 6-frame Codex sampling
failures_before_repair: review previously mixed seated and lying poses; simplified to seated observation
